title: Introduce yourself
prompt: Write a short introduction about yourself in Swedish.

payload.stimulus: Skriv en kort text om dig själv: ditt namn, din ålder och var du bor.
criteria: States name, age, and place of living in Swedish
Uses simple present-tense sentences (jag heter, jag är, jag bor)
Spelling and word order are mostly correct

title: Shopping note
prompt: Write a short shopping note to your family.

payload.stimulus: Skriv en kort lapp till din familj. Skriv tre eller fyra saker de ska köpa på ICA.
criteria: Lists three to four everyday food or household items in Swedish
Uses correct nouns and simple linking words (och)
Message is clear and easy to understand

title: Message to your teacher
prompt: Write a short message to your SFI teacher.

payload.stimulus: Du är sjuk i dag och kan inte komma till SFI. Skriv ett kort meddelande till din lärare Anna.
criteria: Greets the teacher and gives a reason for being absent
Uses present tense and simple sentences (jag är sjuk, jag kan inte komma)
Ends with a short closing (Hälsningar + name)

title: Your family
prompt: Write a few sentences about your family in Swedish.

payload.stimulus: Skriv om din familj. Hur många är ni? Vad heter de? Var bor de?
criteria: Names at least two family members and their relationship
Uses possessive forms (min, mitt, mina) correctly most of the time
Sentences are short, clear, and in the present tense

title: Your day
prompt: Describe an ordinary day in Swedish.

payload.stimulus: Beskriv en vanlig dag. Skriv vad du gör på morgonen, på dagen och på kvällen.
criteria: Describes at least three activities across the day
Uses time expressions (på morgonen, klockan sju, på kvällen)
Verbs are in the present tense and mostly correct

title: Booking a health centre visit
prompt: Write a short message to the health centre.

payload.stimulus: Du har ont i ryggen. Skriv ett kort meddelande till vårdcentralen och be om en tid.
criteria: States the health problem in simple Swedish
Asks for an appointment and mentions a day or time
Includes a greeting and the writer's name

title: Where you live
prompt: Write about your home in Swedish.

payload.stimulus: Skriv om ditt hem. Bor du i en lägenhet eller i ett hus? Hur många rum finns det? Vad tycker du om ditt hem?
criteria: Describes the type of home and at least two rooms
Gives one simple opinion (jag tycker om, det är bra)
Uses correct indefinite and definite noun forms most of the time

title: Invite a friend
prompt: Write a short invitation in Swedish.

payload.stimulus: Bjud in en vän på fika hemma hos dig. Skriv vilken dag, vilken tid och var du bor.
criteria: Includes day, time, and place clearly
Uses a polite invitation phrase (vill du komma, kan du komma)
Message is short, friendly, and easy to follow

title: Present yourself
prompt: Introduce yourself out loud in Swedish.

payload.stimulus: Berätta om dig själv: ditt namn, din ålder, var du bor och varifrån du kommer.
criteria: Gives name, age, and where they live and come from
Speaks in clear, simple full sentences
Pronunciation is understandable

title: Talk about your family
prompt: Talk about your family in Swedish.

payload.stimulus: Berätta om din familj. Vem bor du med? Vad heter de? Hur gamla är de?
criteria: Mentions at least two people and their relationship to the speaker
Uses simple present-tense sentences
Speech is audible and mostly fluent

payload.stimulus: Berätta vad du köper i affären. Var handlar du? Vad kostar maten?
criteria: Names at least three food items in Swedish
Mentions a shop and a price in kronor
Sentences are short and understandable

title: How you travel
prompt: Talk about how you travel in Swedish.

payload.stimulus: Berätta hur du reser till SFI eller till jobbet. Åker du buss, tåg eller cykel? Hur lång tid tar det?
criteria: Names one or two means of transport
Says how long the trip takes
Uses present tense and clear pronunciation

title: At the doctor
prompt: Explain a health problem out loud.

payload.stimulus: Du är på vårdcentralen. Berätta för doktorn vad du har för problem och hur länge du har haft det.
criteria: Names at least one symptom in Swedish (ont i, feber, hosta)
Says how long the problem has lasted
Speaks clearly enough to be understood

title: Your week
prompt: Talk about your week in Swedish.

payload.stimulus: Berätta vad du gör i veckan. Vad gör du på vardagar och vad gör du på helgen?
criteria: Mentions activities on both weekdays and the weekend
Uses days of the week correctly
Speech is connected with simple linking words (och, men, sedan)

title: Your home town
prompt: Describe the place where you live.

payload.stimulus: Berätta om staden eller platsen där du bor. Vad finns där? Vad tycker du om platsen?
criteria: Names at least two places or features (affär, park, buss, skola)
Gives one simple opinion about the place
Speaks in full, understandable sentences
